title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers video walks through a cleanup checklist for identifying surprise charges that persist after deleting cloud resources. Covers hidden costs from RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, and recommends setting up billing alarms for cost monitoring.
